description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style, figure flattering cuts and lean fits in each and every one of its creations. That, and the colour, makes this pink polka dot dress a must buy for the summer. Wear it with simple flats and understated accessories for a simple and fashionable day out look.Product Details Pink sleeveless dress with white polka dots, has a round neckline, a half buttoned placket, flaring pin tucks from waist down on either side of the placket, A line shape and a curved hemline  Material and CareCotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron  Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 81 cm from shoulder to hem
